title: Simple Zoom
description: A simple, lightweight, and fast plugin that lets you zoom
body:
Zoom in without mods using this simple plugin

❇️​ This plugin belongs to the [Simple Plugins](https://modrinth.com/collection/NkfcCoA2) collection, check out other similar and compatible plugins here

## Features
- **Use /zoom to use the feature**
- Simple and lightweight
- Fully configurable

![test](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/bvvHc.gif)

## Commands
- **/zoom** Use the feature
- **/zoom reload** Reloads plugin configuration

## Permissions
- **szoom.use:** Allows the user to use the /zoom command
- **szoom.reload:** Enables the user to use the /zoom reload command

## Configuration


### Requirements
- Java 21 (LTS)
- Paper or Spigot server on the latest supported version
  
### Internal behaviour
- The plugin gives you a temporary Spyglass in your off-hand that disappears with one of the configurable functions.
- If the user had an item in their off-hand, it is temporarily returned to their inventory. If the inventory is full, the item is saved with all its properties (durability, enchantments, name, etc.) and returned to the user after use.
- We prevent the user from stealing or dropping the item.
